next_steps: Secure airway under controlled conditions due to risk of hemorrhage
Perform excisional biopsy of the peritonsillar mass with hemostatic control
Perform histologic evaluation including H&E and immunohistochemistry for myogenic markers (MyoD1, myogenin, desmin)
Perform molecular testing including FISH for FOXO1 translocation to rule out alveolar rhabdomyosarcoma
Initiate staging with whole-body PET-CT or CT imaging of the chest, abdomen, and pelvis
Consult pediatric/adult oncology specialists for multidisciplinary care planning
